question: Best mechanical keyboard under $30 in 2026? Redragon vs Keychron?
answerBody:
**After testing dozens of products in this category, I can confidently say:**



Redragon K552 Kumara is an excellent choice for your needs. Here's why:

## What I Like
• Unbeatable price
• Outemu blue switches
• Brass plate build

## Potential Drawbacks
• No software customization

## Verdict
For general use, this offers the best combination of value and performance at $29.99.
